tooltip: Select Rusl as your hero of choice.

heroSelectionDescriptionElements.tooltipText: Rusl focuses on upgrading Ordonian units.
Allows you to summon Rusl, a sword and shield armed hero.
Melee Infantry that can climb cliffs and mountains and crossbow unit.
Economic unit that focuses on gathering wood.
Sentry Towers and Fortresses that can work as dropoff sites.
